# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use DOMDocument;
use DOMXPath;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function __invoke(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'url' => ['required', 'url', 'max:2048'],
        ]);

        $targetUrl = $request->input('url');
        $previewData = [
            'url'         => $targetUrl,
            'title'       => null,
            'description' => null,
            'image'       => null,
            'favicon'     => null,
            'site_name'   => null,
        ];

        try {
            $response = Http::timeout(10)
                            ->withUserAgent('Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36')
                            ->get($targetUrl);

            if ($response->clientError() || $response->serverError()) {
                return response()->json([
                    'message' => 'Failed to fetch URL. HTTP Status: ' . $response->status(),
                    'status' => $response->status(),
                ], $response->status());
            }

            $htmlContent = $response->body();

            $dom = new DOMDocument();
            @$dom->loadHTML($htmlContent);
            $xpath = new DOMXPath($dom);

            $titleNode = $xpath->query('//title')->item(0);
            if ($titleNode) {
                $previewData['title'] = trim($titleNode->textContent);
            }

            $descriptionNode = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='description']/@content | //meta[@property='og:description']/@content")->item(0);
            if ($descriptionNode) {
                $previewData['description'] = trim($descriptionNode->nodeValue);
            }

            $imageNode = $xpath->query("//meta[@property='og:image']/@content | //meta[@name='twitter:image']/@content")->item(0);
            if ($imageNode) {
                $previewData['image'] = $this->absoluteUrl($imageNode->nodeValue, $targetUrl);
            }

            $faviconNode = $xpath->query("//link[@rel='icon']/@href | //link[@rel='shortcut icon']/@href")->item(0);
            if ($faviconNode) {
                $previewData['favicon'] = $this->absoluteUrl($faviconNode->nodeValue, $targetUrl);
            } else {
                $parsedUrl = parse_url($targetUrl);
                if (isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) && isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
                    $previewData['favicon'] = $parsedUrl['scheme'] . '://' . $parsedUrl['host'] . '/favicon.ico';
                }
            }

            $siteNameNode = $xpath->query("//meta[@property='og:site_name']/@content")->item(0);
            if ($siteNameNode) {
                $previewData['site_name'] = trim($siteNameNode->nodeValue);
            } else {
                $parsedUrl = parse_url($targetUrl);
                if (isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
                    $host = str_replace('www.', '', $parsedUrl['host']);
                    $previewData['site_name'] = ucwords(explode('.', $host)[0]);
                }
            }

            return response()->json($previewData);

        } catch (\Illuminate\Http\Client\RequestException $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'Failed to connect to the URL: ' . $e->getMessage(),
            ], 500);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred: ' . $e->getMessage(),
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    protected function absoluteUrl(string $relativePath, string $baseUrl): string
    {
        if (filter_var($relativePath, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return $relativePath;
        }

        $parsedBase = parse_url($baseUrl);
        $scheme = $parsedBase['scheme'] ?? 'http';
        $host = $parsedBase['host'] ?? '';
        $port = isset($parsedBase['port']) ? ':' . $parsedBase['port'] : '';
        $path = $parsedBase['path'] ?? '/';

        if (substr($relativePath, 0, 1) === '/') {
            return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $relativePath;
        }

        $basePath = dirname($path);
        if ($basePath === DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR || $basePath === '.') {
            $basePath = '';
        }

        $basePath = rtrim($basePath, '/') . '/';

        return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $basePath . $relativePath;
    }
}
